2026-07-23.hint: every word on this board is missing the same burning partner
2026-07-23.definition: the hot glow and flames of something burning

2026-07-24.hint: you can't see it for the trees
2026-07-24.definition: a large area covered chiefly with trees and undergrowth

2026-07-25.hint: a creature hides inside every word — where would you go to spot them all?
2026-07-25.definition: an expedition to observe wild animals in their habitat

2026-07-26.hint: one more piece belongs in this family — second place knows it well
2026-07-26.definition: a precious grey-white metal used in coins and jewelry

2026-07-27.hint: everything here belongs to the machine that never stops moving
2026-07-27.definition: the machine that carves the day into hours and minutes

2026-07-28.hint: these words have nothing in common until the sky opens up
2026-07-28.definition: water falling in drops from the clouds

2026-07-29.hint: step right up — every word performs under the same striped roof
2026-07-29.definition: the traveling show of acrobats, animals, and clowns

2026-07-30.hint: each of these words has quietly swallowed something you learned before the alphabet
2026-07-30.definition: to name numbers in order; to add up a total

2026-07-31.hint: the orchestra is missing one deep voice
2026-07-31.definition: the deep-voiced string instrument held between the knees

2026-08-01.hint: everything here belongs to the scourge of the high seas
2026-08-01.definition: a robber who attacks ships at sea

2026-08-02.hint: these strangers all attach to the same bound companion
2026-08-02.definition: a set of printed pages bound together for reading

2026-08-03.hint: bring a canteen — today's board is bone dry
2026-08-03.definition: a dry, barren expanse of sand and sun

2026-08-04.hint: someone left spare parts inside every word — a specialist could name them all
2026-08-04.definition: the structure of the body and its parts

2026-08-05.hint: one more bloom belongs in this bouquet — the dutch went mad for it
2026-08-05.definition: a cupped spring flower grown from a bulb

2026-08-06.hint: what everything on this board can end up being — handle with care
2026-08-06.definition: shattered, cracked, or no longer working

2026-08-07.hint: every word is missing the same head start
2026-08-07.definition: above, across, or more than enough

2026-08-08.hint: where the ovens never sleep and the shelves smell sweet
2026-08-08.definition: a shop where bread and pastries are made and sold

2026-08-09.hint: every word here is secretly wearing a different shade
2026-08-09.definition: the board an artist mixes colors on

2026-08-10.hint: one more swimmer belongs in this school — it heads upstream
2026-08-10.definition: a large fish with pink flesh that swims upriver to spawn

2026-08-11.hint: everything here belongs to the robed keeper of spells
2026-08-11.definition: a person with magical powers in stories and legend

2026-08-12.hint: twelve strangers waiting for the same cold companion
2026-08-12.definition: soft white frozen flakes that fall from winter clouds
